descriptions.paymentCalcDesc: The Payment Calculator can determine the monthly payment amount or loan term for a fixed interest loan. Use the "Fixed Term" tab to calculate the monthly payment of a fixed-term loan. Use the "Fixed Payments" tab to calculate the time to pay off a loan with a fixed monthly payment.

standalone.amortizationDesc: Gratis | Calculate loan payments, total interest, and view annual and monthly amortization schedules.
standalone.annuityPayoutDesc: Gratis | Estimate the annuity payout amount for a fixed payout length or estimate the length that an annuity can last.
standalone.autoLoanDesc: Gratis | Calculate monthly payments, sales tax, and total costs for car loans.
standalone.creditCardsPayoffDesc: Gratis | Create a cost-efficient payback schedule for multiple credit cards using the Debt Avalanche method.
standalone.currencyDesc: Gratis | Convert currency amounts using real-time or custom exchange rates.
standalone.debtConsolidationDesc: Gratis | Determine whether it is financially rewarding to consolidate debts by comparing current debts with a consolidation loan.
standalone.estateTaxDesc: Gratis | Estimate federal estate tax due based on assets, liabilities, and lifetime gifted amounts.
standalone.houseAffordabilityDesc: Gratis | Estimate an affordable purchase amount for a house based on household income or fixed monthly budgets.
standalone.incomeTaxDesc: Gratis | Estimate the refund or potential owed amount on a federal tax return.
standalone.interestRateDesc: Gratis | Determine real interest rates on loans with fixed terms and monthly payments.
standalone.mortgageDesc: Gratis | Estimate the monthly payment due along with other financial costs associated with mortgages.
standalone.paymentDesc: Gratis | Determine the monthly payment amount or loan term for a fixed interest loan.
standalone.rentDesc: Gratis | Estimate the affordable monthly rental spending amount based on income and debt level.
standalone.salaryDesc: Gratis | Convert salary amounts to their corresponding values based on payment frequency.
standalone.socialSecurityDesc: Gratis | Determine the ideal age at which a person should apply for Social Security retirement benefits.
standalone.studentLoanDesc: Gratis | Estimate monthly payments, repayment schedules, and total interest for federal and private student loans.

about.metaTitle: Acerca de - Calculadoras Gratuitas en Línea
about.metaDescription: Conozca nuestra colección de calculadoras en línea gratuitas para finanzas, salud, matemáticas y más.
about.title: Acerca de Nuestra Colección de Calculadoras
about.intro: We provide a comprehensive suite of free online calculators designed to help you make informed decisions in various aspects of life.

categories.financial: {bold}Financial Calculators{/bold}: Mortgage, loans, investments, retirement, and business calculations
categories.health: {bold}Health & Fitness Calculators{/bold}: BMI, BMR, calorie tracking, pregnancy, and wellness metrics
categories.math: {bold}Math & Conversion Calculators{/bold}: Scientific calculations, unit conversions, statistics, and mathematical tools
categories.specialized: {bold}Specialized Calculators{/bold}: Date/time, automotive, construction, and other practical tools

about.privacy: All calculators are designed with accuracy, ease of use, and privacy in mind. No personal data is collected or stored when using our tools.
about.continuous: We're constantly adding new calculators and improving existing ones based on user feedback and evolving needs.
about.missionText: To empower everyone with free, accurate, and easy-to-use calculation tools that help make better decisions in finance, health, education, and daily life.

contact.metaDescription: Póngase en contacto con el equipo de JDCALC. Agradecemos sus comentarios y sugerencias.
contact.title: Contáctenos
contact.intro: Have feedback, suggestions, or found a bug? We'd love to hear from you.

privacy.metaTitle: Política de Privacidad - Calculadoras Gratuitas en Línea
privacy.metaDescription: Nuestra política de privacidad explica cómo manejamos sus datos al usar nuestras herramientas de calculadora en línea gratuitas.
privacy.title: Política de Privacidad
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy outlines how we handle your information when you use our calculator tools.
privacy.dataCollectionText: Our calculators run entirely in your browser. Any numbers you enter are processed locally and are never sent to our servers. We do not collect, store, or share any calculation inputs.
privacy.cookiesText: We use minimal cookies necessary for site functionality (e.g., theme preference). No tracking or advertising cookies are used.
privacy.thirdPartiesText: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions about this policy, please contact us.

terms.metaTitle: Términos de Servicio - Calculadoras Gratuitas en Línea
terms.metaDescription: Términos y condiciones para usar nuestras herramientas de calculadora en línea gratuitas.
terms.title: Términos de Servicio
terms.intro: By using our calculator tools, you agree to these terms of service.
terms.useOfServicesText: Our calculators are provided for informational and educational purposes only. Results are estimates and should not replace professional advice in financial, medical, legal, or other matters.
terms.accuracyText: We strive for accuracy but make no guarantees. Always verify critical calculations with a qualified professional.
terms.availabilityText: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue any calculator tool at any time without notice.
